name: Velvet Standard
description: Black canvas, white text, gold accent. Cormorant Garamond serif with thin weights. Premium, luxury, finance, and high-end brand content.

typography.note: Use weight 300 (light) for headlines — the contrast of large thin letterforms is the luxury signal. Gold accent used sparingly: one element per scene max. Motion is slow and deliberate — long ease durations (0.9–1.4s). No bold animations; prefer fades and slow rises.

css.hed: font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-weight:300; font-size:130px; color:#f8f8f8; line-height:1.05;
css.capText: font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:34px; font-weight:400; color:#c9a84c; text-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.9); padding:0 140px; line-height:1.5;
